ogTitle: Blue Nobby vs Blueys Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blue Nobby and Blueys Beach.
heading: Blue Nobby vs Blueys Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blue Nobby, New South Wales and Blueys Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blue Nobby has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Blueys Beach (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blue Nobby or Blueys Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blue Nobby has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Blueys Beach scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blue Nobby scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Blueys Beach scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blue Nobby or Blueys Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blue Nobby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
